title: Nuclear Warfare Weaponry
description: adds nukes, thermonuclear bombs, and ballistic missiles
body:
this mod adds the chance of a meteor falling near you every tick. when a meteor falls it will make a crater and sometimes spawn a uranium ore. the uranium ore can be harvested, crafted into uranium 235, demon core, and eventually an atom bomb. the atom bomb creates a very large explosion upon powering with redstone, but be careful because raw uranium and uranium 235 being stored in your inventory for extended periods of time can cause radiation poisoning. Note: try to be careful when handling a demon core ;)

 

the mod also includes a thermonuclear bomb which requires a reactor to craft, plus 3 types of missiles: intercontinental ballistic missiles, nuclear ballistic missiles, and thermonuclear ballisitic missiles. each have their own radio to call them in and their own recipes.

-1 uranium 235 and 1 netherite scrap in a reactor creates tritium
